description: Receive external order webhooks, normalize the payload with an LLM, and return a synchronous JSON processing result

options.label: Chat Input
options.name: chatInput
options.description: Start the conversation with chat input

options.label: Form Input
options.name: formInput
options.description: Start the workflow with form inputs

options.label: Webhook Trigger
options.name: webhookTrigger
options.description: Trigger the workflow via an external webhook

options.label: Schedule Input
options.name: scheduleInput
options.description: Start the workflow on a recurring schedule (cron)

inputParams.label: Form Description
inputParams.name: formDescription
inputParams.placeholder: Complete all fields below to continue

inputParams.label: Form Input Types
inputParams.name: formInputTypes
inputParams.description: Specify the type of form input

array.label: Variable Name
array.name: name
array.placeholder: Variable name for the input (must be camel case)
array.description: Variable name must be camel case. For example: firstName, lastName, etc.

inputParams.label: Content Type
inputParams.name: webhookContentType
inputParams.description: Expected Content-Type of incoming requests. For application/x-www-form-urlencoded, if the entire payload is a JSON string in a "payload" field (e.g. GitHub webhooks), it is automatically parsed — use $webhook.body.* as normal.

inputParams.label: Webhook URL
inputParams.name: webhookURL
inputParams.description: Send a request to this URL to trigger the workflow

inputParams.label: Input Mode
inputParams.name: webhookInputMode
inputParams.description: What this Start node passes as input to the rest of the flow when a webhook fires.

options.label: Custom Text
options.name: text
options.description: Pass a fixed string. Reference webhook fields with $webhook.body.* / $webhook.headers.* / $webhook.query.*

options.label: No Input
options.name: none
options.description: Pass nothing. Use $webhook.* references inside downstream node configs to access the payload.

options.label: Full Webhook Payload
options.name: payload
options.description: Pass the full JSON-serialized webhook payload (body, headers, query). Useful for debugging; bloats LLM context.

inputParams.label: Custom Text
inputParams.name: webhookDefaultInput
inputParams.description: Text passed to downstream nodes as the user input. Use {{ $webhook.body.* }}, {{ $webhook.headers.* }}, or {{ $webhook.query.* }} to interpolate fields from the incoming request.

inputParams.label: Verify request signature
inputParams.name: webhookEnableAuth
inputParams.description: Reject incoming requests that do not include a valid signature. Turn this on if your sender (GitHub, Stripe, Slack, GitLab, etc.) signs each request with a shared secret, then generate a secret below and copy it to the sender. Leave off for testing or trusted networks.

inputParams.label: Webhook Secret
inputParams.name: webhookSecret
inputParams.description: Click Generate Secret to create a random shared secret, then copy it into your sender so it can sign each request. Use Signature Header and Signature Type below to match how your sender delivers the signature.

inputParams.label: Signature Header
inputParams.name: webhookSignatureHeader
inputParams.description: The request header that carries the signature. e.g. x-hub-signature-256 for GitHub, stripe-signature for Stripe, x-gitlab-token for GitLab.

inputParams.label: Signature Type
inputParams.name: webhookSignatureType
inputParams.description: How to verify the signature. HMAC-SHA256 for GitHub, Stripe, Slack (supports sha256=<hex> prefix automatically). Plain Token for GitLab-style plain secret comparison.

inputParams.label: Response Mode
inputParams.name: webhookResponseMode
inputParams.description: How Flowise replies to the incoming webhook request.

options.label: Synchronous
options.name: sync
options.description: Wait for the flow to finish and return the full result as JSON. Simple but blocks the caller; can time out for senders with short HTTP windows.

options.label: Asynchronous (callback)
options.name: async
options.description: Return 202 Accepted immediately and run the flow in the background. Set a Callback URL below to have the result POSTed there when the flow finishes; leave it blank for fire-and-forget. Best for senders with short HTTP timeouts.

options.label: Streaming (SSE)
options.name: stream
options.description: Return a Server-Sent Events stream so the caller sees tokens and agent steps as they happen. Best for custom callers (browsers using fetch+ReadableStream, internal services). NOT compatible with senders that expect a single quick response.

inputParams.label: Callback URL
inputParams.name: callbackUrl
inputParams.description: Optional. Flowise will POST the flow result to this URL when the flow finishes. Leave blank for fire-and-forget — the flow still runs in the background, but no callback is delivered.

inputParams.label: Callback Secret
inputParams.name: callbackSecret
inputParams.description: Optional. If set, outgoing callback POSTs are signed with HMAC-SHA256 and delivered as X-Flowise-Signature: sha256=<hex> so your callback endpoint can verify the request came from Flowise.

inputParams.label: Validate request shape
inputParams.name: webhookEnableValidation
inputParams.description: Reject requests that are missing required headers, body fields, or query parameters declared below. Turn this on to enforce a request contract and catch bad requests early. Leave off to accept any payload and let the flow handle validation itself.

inputParams.label: Expected Query Parameters
inputParams.name: webhookQueryParams
inputParams.description: Declare expected query parameters. Leave empty to accept any.

inputParams.label: Expected Body Parameters
inputParams.name: webhookBodyParams
inputParams.description: Define expected parameters in the webhook request body. Leave empty to accept any JSON body.

inputParams.label: Expected Headers
inputParams.name: webhookHeaderParams
inputParams.description: Declare expected request headers. Leave empty to accept any.

options.label: Visual Picker
options.name: visualPicker
options.description: Use a visual picker to select schedule options

options.label: Cron Expression
options.name: cronExpression
options.description: Use a cron expression to define the schedule

inputParams.label: Cron Expression
inputParams.name: scheduleCronExpression
inputParams.description: Standard 5-field cron expression (minute hour day month weekday). Example: "0 9 * * 1-5" runs at 09:00 every weekday.

options.label: Hourly
options.name: hourly
options.description: Run every hour at the specified time

options.label: Daily
options.name: daily
options.description: Run every day at the specified time

options.label: Weekly
options.name: weekly
options.description: Run every week on the specified day and time

options.label: Monthly
options.name: monthly
options.description: Run every month on the specified date and time

inputParams.label: On Minute
inputParams.name: scheduleOnMinute
inputParams.description: Minute of the hour when the schedule should run (0-59). For example, "30" means the schedule will run at the 30th minute of the hour.

inputParams.label: End Date
inputParams.name: scheduleEndDate
inputParams.description: Optional date after which the schedule will stop firing.

inputParams.label: Timezone
inputParams.name: scheduleTimezone
inputParams.description: IANA timezone. Defaults to UTC.

inputParams.label: Schedule Input Mode
inputParams.name: scheduleInputMode
inputParams.description: How the schedule should invoke this flow on each fire.

options.label: Default Text Input
options.name: text
options.description: Pass a fixed text string as the question on every fire

options.label: Form Input
options.name: form
options.description: Pass default values for the form fields below on every fire

options.label: No Input
options.name: none
options.description: Fire with no input.

inputParams.label: Default Input
inputParams.name: scheduleDefaultInput
inputParams.description: Default question/input passed to the flow when it is triggered by the scheduler.

inputParams.label: Form Fields
inputParams.name: scheduleFormInputTypes
inputParams.description: Define the typed fields this scheduled flow receives on each fire.

array.label: Variable Name
array.name: name
array.placeholder: Variable name for the input (must be camel case)
array.description: Variable name must be camel case. For example: firstName, lastName, etc.

inputParams.label: Default Form Values
inputParams.name: scheduleFormDefaults
inputParams.description: Default values for the form fields above, as a JSON object keyed by variable name. Example: { "team": "engineering", "metric": "p95" }

inputParams.label: Ephemeral Memory
inputParams.name: startEphemeralMemory
inputParams.description: Start fresh for every execution without past chat history

inputParams.label: Flow State
inputParams.name: startState
inputParams.description: Runtime state during the execution of the workflow

inputParams.label: Persist State
inputParams.name: startPersistState
inputParams.description: Persist the state in the same session

data.label: 接单解析处理
data.name: llmAgentflow
data.description: Large language models to analyze user-provided inputs and generate responses

inputParams.label: Enable Memory
inputParams.name: llmEnableMemory
inputParams.description: Enable memory for the conversation thread

options.label: All Messages
options.name: allMessages
options.description: Retrieve all messages from the conversation

options.label: Window Size
options.name: windowSize
options.description: Uses a fixed window size to surface the last N messages

options.label: Conversation Summary
options.name: conversationSummary
options.description: Summarizes the whole conversation

options.label: Conversation Summary Buffer
options.name: conversationSummaryBuffer
options.description: Summarize conversations once token limit is reached. Default to 2000

inputParams.label: Window Size
inputParams.name: llmMemoryWindowSize
inputParams.description: Uses a fixed window size to surface the last N messages

inputParams.label: Max Token Limit
inputParams.name: llmMemoryMaxTokenLimit
inputParams.description: Summarize conversations once token limit is reached. Default to 2000

inputParams.label: Input Message
inputParams.name: llmUserMessage
inputParams.description: Add an input message as user message at the end of the conversation

inputParams.label: JSON Structured Output
inputParams.name: llmStructuredOutput
inputParams.description: Instruct the LLM to give output in a JSON structured schema

array.label: JSON Schema
array.name: jsonSchema
array.description: JSON schema for the structured output

inputParams.label: Update Flow State
inputParams.name: llmUpdateState
inputParams.description: Update runtime state during the execution of the workflow

llmMessages.content: 你是订单自动处理助手。请读取 Webhook payload，抽取订单号、客户、商品、风险点和下一步动作，只输出可读的中文处理结果，并在末尾给出一个 JSON 摘要。

Webhook Body：

{{ $webhook.body }}

Webhook Headers：

{{ $webhook.headers }}

data.label: 同步返回结果
data.name: directReplyAgentflow
data.description: Directly reply to the user with a message

data.label: 说明
data.name: stickyNoteAgentflow
data.description: Add notes to the agent flow

inputs.note:
Webhook 接单自动处理

Start 已配置为 POST application/json + 同步响应。打开画布右侧 Webhook 监听器可复制 URL 并实时观察请求执行。
